{"analysis":"The password has been successfully recovered and verified. It meets all criteria:

- Starts with '8XD' ✅
- Ends with 'W54' ✅
- Contains only uppercase letters and digits ✅
- Written to /app/recovered_passwords.txt ✅

The forensic recovery was done by analyzing a corrupted zip archive embedded in a 4MB binary data file at /app/varsea/disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat.
